message:
feat(connectors): add secretless credential_id mode, timeout validation, retry-after parsing, and wiremock test scaffolds

Apply a uniform pattern across 13 scaffold connectors (brave-search,
deepgram, elevenlabs, exa, firecrawl, huggingface, mistral, openrouter,
perplexity-search, tavily, tlon, zalo, zalouser):

- CredentialId mode is now secretless with Auth::is_secretless(); health,
  doctor, self_check, and invoke all report degraded or reject when
  host-side credential injection is not available
- CredentialId no longer injects a header directly; host-side injection
  is now explicit
- Reject request_timeout_ms=0 during configuration
- Parse Retry-After headers on 429/5xx for upstream backoff hints
- map_reqwest_error takes &reqwest::Error instead of owned
- Add reqwest, url, wiremock dependencies and initial contract test
  suites with hundreds of lines of wiremock-based tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
